arts.ttl: Preview, Squad List, Team News: Dépor ABANCA vs. Real Madrid; Liga F
arts.sum: As for availability, Melanie Leupolz is back to the squad while Maëlle Lakrar is still out for discomfort that prevented her from being available for this week's games. Real Madrid will face Deportivo ABANCA on matchday 13 of Liga F.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold breaks silence on Liverpool future - as links to Real Madrid ramp up with his contract up in the summer
arts.sum: The defender has been at the Reds since 2004, breaking into the first team in 2016 and quickly becoming a fan favourite with his pinpoint crosses and dangerous set pieces.

arts.ttl: Mbappe knights Saliba as Real Madrid circle for Arsenal superstar
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe has been honoured as France's best footballer of the 2023/24 season, but he believes that William Saliba would have been just as deserving of the award. Mbappe knights Saliba as Real Madrid circle for Arsenal superstar

arts.ttl: Man Utd 'face Real Madrid & Barcelona competition' to re-sign defender
arts.sum: Man Utd will reportedly battle Barcelona and Real Madrid to sign Benfica left-back Alvaro Carreras.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star rejects winter move to Bundesliga
arts.sum: Given how stretched Real Madrid’s squad has been so far this season, it is unlikely that anyone would leave the club during the upcoming winter transfer window – especially as there is not expected to be any signings. However, that has not stopped clubs from making arrangements to make a move for Endrick Felipe. According […] The post Real Madrid star rejects winter move to Bundesliga appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Predicted Teams Rayo Vallecano-Real Madrid: Two changes to be made by Carlo Ancelotti
arts.sum: For the first time this season, Real Madrid can go top of La Liga – albeit they may only do so for 24 hours as Barcelona play tomorrow. They take on Rayo Vallecano in a local derby that promises to be a very intriguing occasion. Real Madrid have bounced back well in recent weeks, having […] The post Predicted Teams Rayo Vallecano-Real Madrid: Two changes to be made by Carlo Ancelotti appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Rayo Vallecano vs Real Madrid, 2024 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: The Estadio de Vallecas is always a very tough stadium for visiting teams, so Real Madrid will need to make sure they capitalize on the scoring opportunities they get in order to earn the three points. Real Madrid visit Rayo Vallecano in what’s expected to be a tough away game for Los Blancos.

arts.ttl: Man United in pole position for €50m-rated Luke Shaw replacement as Real Madrid withdraw interest
arts.sum: Luke Shaw’s injury concerns will soon see him moved on at Man United, and the Red Devils are now in pole position to land a €50m-rated replacement. The England international isn’t likely to be the only departure with Ruben Amorim keen to see another player leave in the January window. arts.ttl: Where to watch Rayo Vallecano vs Real Madrid on TV, stream it online
arts.sum: The LaLiga matchday-17 game between Rayo Vallecano and Real Madrid will be played at the Estadio de Vallecas, Spain, on Saturday December 14, 2024. After getting their Champions League campaign back on track in midweek, Real Madrid now have the chance to leapfrog Barcelona at the top of LaLiga - for a day, at least - when they visit Rayo Vallecano.
